allow: PowerShell(Get-Content "NoSettings_Geothermal.tsv" -TotalCount 1 | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "`t"\).Length } | Tee-Object -Variable colCount; "Columns: $colCount"; Get-Content "NoSettings_Geothermal.tsv" -TotalCount 1 | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "`t"\)[0..10] -join "|" })

PowerShell(Clear-Content "$env:APPDATA\\Vensim\\vensimdp.err" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\Vensim\\vendss64.exe" -ArgumentList "CrudeProbe.cmd" -WorkingDirectory $pwd -PassThru -NoNewWindow -Wait; "ExitCode: $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Get-ChildItem CrudeProbe.tsv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List Name,Length,LastWriteTime)
Bash(awk -F'\\t' '/^Electricity Generation Capacity by Type Including Distributed Generation\\[/ {printf "%-80s 2025=%s 2050=%s\\n", $1, $2, $27}' CrudeProbe.tsv)
Bash(git show e26da030 -- EPS.mdl | grep -E "^[+-]" | grep -v "^+++\\|^---" > /tmp/eps_diff.txt *)
Bash(grep -nA3 "^Marginal Capacity Factor x Hours per Year\\[" EPS.mdl)
Bash(grep -nA3 "^BAU Marginal Capacity Factor x Hours per Year\\[" EPS.mdl)
Bash(grep -nA3 "^Initial Guess at CES Price\\|^Initial Guess at RPS Price\\|^BAU Initial Guess at CES Price\\|^BAU Initial Guess at RPS Price" EPS.mdl)
Bash(grep -cE "^	 Last Year Total Five Year Average Net Energy Market Revenue per MW\\[Electricity Source\\\\\\\\" EPS.mdl)
Bash(grep -cE "^	 Last Year Total Five Year Average Net Energy Market Revenue per MW\\[CCUS Electricity Source\\\\\\\\" EPS.mdl)
Bash(grep -cE "^	 BAU Last Year Total Five Year Average Net Energy Market Revenue per MW\\[Electricity Source\\\\\\\\" EPS.mdl)
Bash(grep -cE "^	 BAU Last Year Total Five Year Average Net Energy Market Revenue per MW\\[CCUS Electricity Source\\\\\\\\" EPS.mdl)
Bash(awk '/^Five Year Average Annual Expected Dispatch Costs by Power Plant Type\\[/{f=1} f{print; if\(/~\\s*\\|/\) exit}' /tmp/EPS_pushed.mdl)
